message:
So, the other day, I was trying to be all prepared and organized. I thought, "Hey, let’s check the go-bags and make sure we have everything we need." I opened mine up, and what did I find? A half-eaten granola bar from last summer, a pair of mismatched socks, and my kid’s old toy dinosaur! Not exactly the emergency supplies I was hoping for. 

It was a hilarious reminder that being ready isn’t just about having the right gear—it's about keeping it updated and relevant to our lives. 

I ended up having a little laugh with my family as we sorted through the bags together, making it a fun family activity. We even discovered some things we really could use! 

If nothing else, it sparked a great conversation about what we’d really need in a pinch. Sometimes, a little comedy goes a long way in preparedness, right?  

Have you ever found something silly in your emergency supplies?
